meta.name: Bless
meta.description: A dog enters a life almost by chance… and quietly becomes everything.  Through four moments, this short film tells the story of a bond that feels simple — but means everything.  This is not just a story about a dog.  It’s a story about time… love… and letting go.  BLESS is a short film written and directed by Yann Mazieres, starring Ulysse — a dog actor whose presence carries the entire story.  “For you, it was part of your life. For him, it was all of it.”
